A '''cold grenade''' was a type of [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] which exerted pressurized gas that froze objects when it made contact with the outside world. This made a form of ice. This type of grenade was not commonly used and was only used by trackers/[[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] that intended on capturing their victims alive. It is believed that this type of grenade stopped being produced at the end of the [[Jedi Civil War]], though some variants of this were still in use during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Revan once acquired a special cold grenade on Korriban. He later used this grenade to freeze a pathway that would lead him to a [[Star Map]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
